violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Griddle doesn't fit under the vent hood.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Paper towel dispenser at the hand wash sink was out.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Wood box shelf in the kitchen needs painted.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
